summary: Verified all 3 reported admin dashboard issues are FIXED: 1) Map filters (city, available, online) are responding correctly 2) 4 redundant stat icons removed from main admin page 3) Action menus (view, ban, delete) working when clicking 3-dot button on Users/Sellers/Delivery tabs

city_filter.details: City dropdown visible with 15 city options. Selecting a city triggers data refresh and shows filtered results

available_only_filter.details: 'المتاحين فقط' checkbox visible and functional. Clicking toggles filter and refreshes driver list

online_only_filter.details: 'المتصلين فقط' checkbox visible and functional. Added to useEffect dependencies - now triggers data refresh correctly

stat_icons_removal.details: 4 redundant stat icons (users, products, orders, drivers) REMOVED from admin main page. Page now shows organized section groups: المستخدمين والدعم, التوصيل والسائقين, البائعين والمنتجات, العروض والتسويق

users_tab.name_click_modal: PASS - Clicking on user name opens 'تفاصيل المستخدم' modal with name, phone, city, registration date, and Ban/Delete buttons
users_tab.three_dot_menu: PASS - Menu shows: عرض التفاصيل (View), حظر (Ban), حذف (Delete)

sellers_tab.name_click_modal: PASS - Clicking on seller name opens 'تفاصيل البائع' modal
sellers_tab.three_dot_menu: PASS - Menu shows view, ban, delete options

delivery_tab.name_click_modal: PASS - Clicking on driver name opens 'تفاصيل السائق' modal with name, phone, city, status
delivery_tab.three_dot_menu: PASS - Menu shows view, ban, delete options

screenshots_captured: admin_main_page.png - Shows organized section layout without 4 redundant stat icons
drivers_map.png - Shows map with city filter, available filter, online filter
drivers_map_filtered.png - Shows filtered results after applying city and checkbox filters
users_after_menu_click.png - Shows action menu dropdown with View/Ban/Delete options
user_modal.png - Shows user details modal on name click
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard bug fixes verified: 1) DriversMapTab.js has onlineOnly in useEffect dependencies for proper filter response 2) AdminPage.js no longer has 4 large stat icon grid at top 3) UsersTab, SellersTab, DeliveryTab all have MoreVertical action menus with view/ban/delete and clickable names that open detail modals
